taxRateNote: 2025 municipal mill rate (2026 rate not yet finalized at time of writing). Alberta tax bills also include a provincial education tax. The City's 2023-2026 Operating Budget plans 5.10% annual levy increases. Mills = dollars per $1,000 of assessed value.
typicalHomeValueNote: Approximate single-family residential assessment in 2026. The City's 2023-2026 Operating Budget uses a reference assessment of $285,800 and projects a 2026 municipal tax bill of $2,881; we’ve adjusted upward to reflect ongoing assessment growth in Alberta.
sourceLabel: City of Lethbridge 2023-2026 Operating Budget (4-year approved cycle, 2026 column)
dataStatusNote: Transcribed from the City of Lethbridge 2023-2026 Operating Budget book (Tax-Supported / General Fund, 2026 column). Lethbridge runs its OWN municipal police service plus a separately-funded Utility Fund (water, wastewater, waste & recycling, and electric). The Utility Fund (~$206M) is excluded; only the Tax-Supported General Fund is shown here for apples-to-apples comparison with Moncton's operating budget. Stormwater ($1.98M) sits inside General Fund and is bucketed under Transportation to match Saint John's treatment.

nativeDepartments.name: Fire & Emergency Services (incl. integrated EMS, Public Safety Communications Centre)
Regulatory Services (animal control, business licensing, bylaw enforcement)
Transportation (roads, snow removal, street sweeping, traffic signals, bridges)

Water, Wastewater, Waste & Recycling, and Electric run as the City's separate Utility Fund (~$206M) — paid on utility bills, not property tax. Stormwater is the only water-related General Fund item and is shown under Transportation.
Recreation & Culture (arenas, pools, theatres, arts, Nature Centre, Nikka Yuko Japanese Garden)
ENMAX Centre (sports, entertainment, culture, tradeshow venue)
Galt Museum & Archives + Fort Whoop-Up (Boards & Commissions)
Planning & Design (building permits, inspections, land-use compliance, growth planning)
Opportunity Lethbridge (land development, urban revitalization, Lethbridge Airport)
Mayor & City Council + City Manager's Office + City Clerk + City Solicitor
Non-Departmental Revenues & Charges (city-wide fiscal accounts, transfers, contingency)
Pay-As-You-Go Capital Program (debt servicing + capital from operating)
Community Social Development (community programs, social outreach, social services)
